title: Quant/Trading Development Engineer (Hedge Fund, HFT, C++, Java, Golang)
description:
My client is a well-known hedge fund looking to expand its trading team. You will collaborate closely with traders and other teams to ensure the robustness and reliability of the systems that drive the trading operations. The ideal candidate with have hands on experience in HFT and coding in C++/Java/Golang. This new position has just been opened up and offers a unique opportunity to join a high-performing team.

Responsibility:

  • Work closely with quants to develop software solutions to grow the P&L
  • Develop, enhance, maintain, and support trading platforms with continuous performance, stability, and feature improvements
  • Creating visualisation tools and monitors for live trading and simulation (market/position/profit and loss/any other statistics related to trading)
  • Collaboratively work things out with business stakeholders

Requirement:

  • University graduate in Computer Science / Information Technology, Engineering (Computer / Telecommunication) or equivalent
  • At least 3 years’ professional experience in high-performance software development from any industries, with trading platform development experience in a big plus
  • Demonstrate solid programming skills on Java, C++, or Golang, familiar with R, Linux, MySQL, etc.
  • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team
  • Strong desire to deliver high quality results in a timely fashion

If it sounds like your next move, please don’t hesitate to apply. Kindly note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Appreciate your understanding. Data provided is for recruitment purposes only.

About Us

Dada Consultants was established in 2017, with the commitment of providing the best recruitment services in Singapore. We are comprised of a dynamic head-hunting team dedicated to sourcing for highly competent professionals in IT industry. We provide enterprises with customized talent solutions, and bring talents to career advancement.

Join US!

We are the Singapore and China based technology recruitment agency and specialised in providing talent solution for internet and technology industry. Our client portfolio are including the global internet technology giants, technology MNC and Tech startup. Whatever technology clients you are think of? Yes we do have!

Due to confidence and client demand in Singapore, we're looking for an experienced tech recruitment Consultant to join our team to service our clients across Asia Pacific.

In this role you'll help our clients identify & hire talent people not only with the right skills and experience, but also the right motivational and cultural fit - people who'll stay and perform.
